titleStmt.title: SII 24.92: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 92. (A.R. No. 106 of 1947-48.) III PRĀKĀRA, EAST WALL.

summary.p: Registers the sale of fallow land belonging to the temple (tirumaḍappaḷḷipuṟam) in Viḷattūr-nāḍu in Rājamahēndra-vaḷanāḍu by the temple executives (Śrīvaishṇava-vāriyam) to •••• ṅguḍaiyāṉ Mādhavaṉ-Tiruvaraṅgattēvaṉ alias Gaṅgaikoṇḍa Śōḻavijayavēḷār with the stipulation that 10 kalam of pady be made over to the temple. The sale was made under the orders of Pārthivēndra-brahmādirāja, the Śrīkāryam officer. Dated in the 41st year of the king's reign.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻ cūḻn=ta puṇari Akaḻ cūḻnta puviyil ponnemiyaḷavun tannemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattuc cakkarakoṭṭattu vikkiramat toḻilāl putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvaraiyiṭṭam vayirākarattu vāri Alamuṉaik kontaḷavaraicar tantaḷamiriya vāḷuṟai kaḻittut toḻvali kāṭṭip poṟpari naṭāttik kirttiyai niṟutti vaṭa ticai vākai
cūṭit tenticai temaru kamalap pūmakaḷ potumaiyum ponniyāṭaiyum nanṉilap pāvai tanimaiyum tavira vantu punitaṟṟirumaṇimakuṭam vurimaiyiṟ cūṭit tannaṭi yiraṇṭun taṭamuṭiyākat tonnila ventar cūṭa munṉai manuvāṟu perukak kaliyāṟu vaṟuppac ceṅkol ticaitoṟuñ cella veṇkuṭai Iru nila vaḷākam Eṅkaṇuntanātu tiru niḻala veṇ
ṇilāttikaḻa Orutani meruviṟ puliviḷaiyāṭa vārkaṭaṟṟivāntarattup pūpālar tiṟai viṭutanta kalañcori kaḷiṟu muṟai niṟpa vilaṅkiya tennavan karun=talai parun=talait tiṭattan ponnakaṟ puṟattiṭaik kiṭappa vinnāḷ piṟkulap piṟaipol niṟ piḻai yentum colletir koṭā vikkalan kallatar naṅkilituṭa
ṅki maṇalūr naṭuvenat tuṅkapattiraiyaḷavuṟṟu Eṅkaṇum paṭṭa veṅkaḷiṟu viṭṭa tan mānamum kūṟina viramum kiṭappa Eṟina malaikaḷum mutuku neḷippa Iḻinta natikaḷum cūḻnṟuṭain toṭa viḻun=ta kaṭalkaḷun=talaivirittalamarak kuṭaticait tannāḷu kantu tānuntāṉaiyum pannāḷiṭṭam pala pala mutukum payantetir māṟiya jayappe
runtiruvum paḻiyukantu kuṭutta pukaḻin celviyum vāḷāroṇkaṇ maṭantaiya riṭṭamum miḷātu kuṭutta veṅkari niraiyum kaṅkamaṇṭalamum ciṅkaṇamennum pāṇiyiraṇṭum Oru vicaik kaikkoṇṭīṇṭiya pukaḻoṭu pāṇṭi maṇṭalaṅ koḷḷat tiruvuḷḷattaṭaittu veḷḷa varu parittalaṅkaḷum poruparittalaṅkaḷum tan
tiravāriyu muṭaittāy vantu vaṭa kaṭal ten kaṭal pāyvatu polat tanperuñ ceṉaiyai yevippañcavaraiy varaiyum porutamaṟkaḷattañci veru neḷittoṭi Araṇenappukka kāṭaṟattuṭaittu nāṭaṭippaṭuttu maṟṟavar tammai vanacarar tiriyum poccai veñcurameṟṟi koṟṟa vijaiyastampam ticai toṟu niṟutti muttin calāpamum muttamiṭ potiyinu
m matta veṅkaripaṭu maiyyaccaiyyamum kanniyum kaikkoṇṭaruḷit tennāṭṭellai kāṭṭik kaṭal malai nāṭṭuḷḷa cāveṟellān tanivicumpeṟa māveṟiya tan varutanit talaivaraik kuṟukalar kulaiyak koṭṭāṟuṭpaṭa neṟitoṟum nilaikaḷiṭṭaruḷi tiṟaḷ koḷ siṅhāsanan tiriyaviṭṭaruḷi poṅkoḷiyāramum tiruppuyattalaṅkaḷum pola viramun tiyākamum
viḷaṅka pārtoḻac civaniṭattumaiyenat tiyākavalli Avanimuḻutuṭaiyāḷiruppa Ava ḷuṭan kaṅkai viṟṟirunte maṅkaiyar tilatam Eḻicaivallapi Eḻulakamuṭaiyāḷ vāḻi palantani tiru Ūḻiyum Avanimuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum na vīrasiṅhāsa nattu viṟṟiruntaruḷiya [kovirāja]kecaripanmarāna tiripuvanacakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 41 Āvatu Āḻvār
tiruvaraṅkattāḻvārkku śrīkāriyañ ceykiṟa pārttiventira brahmātirājar Evaṟ paṭi śrīvaiyiṣṇavavāriyam tiruveṅkaṭappicca ttu tiruvaraṅkappiccarum Ākkūr tirumāliruñcolai nampiyum Irājāśrīyaścaturveti- maṅkalattu Arikula ṭaiya dāsanum śrī paṇṭāra vāriyam Āritan Ārāvamutu puṇṭarīkanum pāratāyan cirāman Ārāvamutum Āritan
kecavan taniyiḷañciṅkamum Āritan cirākavan cikārimāṟanum pāratāyan kecavan Aṟivariyānum Āḻva yāna Araiyan Ampalak kūttanāna Ārāvamutu villi Uḷḷiṭṭa Āḻvār kanmikaḷom rājādhirāja vaḷanāṭṭu tiruvintaḷūr nāṭṭu kkuṟuvinta kkava
ṅkuṭaiyān mātavan tiruvaraṅkatevanāna coḻavicaiyavelaṟku nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Āḻvār tirumaṭaip paḷḷippuṟamaāna rājamahendravaḷanāṭṭu viḷattūrnāṭṭu taṉi Iṟai nilattu maṇaliṭṭu viṟṟukkuṭutta nilattukku Icainta kiḻpāṟ kellai tirunāṟuṭaiyā
n viḷākattukku meṟkum tenpārkkellai vaittamāneti viḷākattukku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai tennaraṅkan peruntevi viḷākattukku kiḻakkum tiruveḷ ḷiṟaininṟānviḷākattukku kiḻakkum melpārkellai tiruppaḷḷiyeḻucci vi[ḷākat tukku teṟkum Icainta perunān kellai Uḷpaṭṭa nilam n=ta mukkālum In nāṭṭukkā [ mara]kkuṭiyil maṇaliṭāy payir ceyya Uṇṇā
tanilattu melpaṭiyārku viṟṟukkuṭutta nilattukku Icainta kiḻpārkellai punṉaic cuṟṟun tiruviḷākattukku meṟkum tenpārkellai śrīvāsudevaviḷākattukku vaṭakkil vāykkālu melpārkellai maṇaṟkuṭi Ellaikku vaṭapārkellai kāverikakkulaikku teṟkumāka Ivvicainta perunānkellaiyuḷpaṭṭa rūpāy (1/2) Araiyum Āka rūpāy 1(1/4) Oṉṟey kālu
kkum vilaiyāka Āḻvār Ippaṇṭārattu Oṭukkina kācu 1(1/4) Ikkācu Oṉṟe kālum Oṭukkuvittuk koṇṭu Innilam Onṟekālum Ivar tiruttaṟa tiruttikkoṇṭu tiruttaṟṟa nilattukku śrīpaṇṭārakkāl paḷḷi koṇṭānkolāl veli 1 Okku ḷa 8 100 Āka nilam Oṉṟey kālukku ḷa 1000 patin kalamum śrīpaṇṭārattileyaḷakkak kaṭavarākavum ponta ku
ṭimai maṟṟepperpaṭṭutuñ ceyyakkaṭavarallārāka nilattukku puncey varicai pokki Iṟai mikutik koṇṭu Ivar ceyvikkiṟa tirunan=tavānam cila Uttamanukku Icain=ta kiḻpāṟkellai mummuṭi coḻan tirunan=ta- vāṉattukku meṟkum veḷḷattu niroṭu kālukku vaṭakkum kellai śrī lakṣumaṇan
tirunantavānattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellaic caṅkanātan tirunantavānattukku teṟkum Ivicain=ta perunānkellaikkuḷakappaṭṭa rūpāy 4pa nālumāvum cila Uttaman tirunantavānañ ceyyum kan=tāṭai tiruvara ṇan Uḷḷiṭṭār Āḷ 3 mūvaṟku perāl ḷa 100(1/4) Āka toṇṇūṟṟu vai mutal kācu mu
nṟum Āṭṭāṇṭu toṟum tirunantavānañceyvārkku kuṭukka kaṭavarkaḷ Ittirunantavānam kan=tāṭai (riṭai)t tiruvaraṅka m Ivan vaṟkattārume ceytu Innilam Anupavikka kaṭavanāka viṭṭiruppārallatu In kku An=tarāyamum panmai paṇṭai veṭṭiyum maṟṟut tiruvā calile pontatrammaiyum tiruvācalile ponta kuṭimaiyum maṟṟepperpaṭṭatum ceyyak kaṭava
rallātārākavum Ippā Icainta Innilam Ippaṭi kalveṭṭik koḷḷap peruvārāka viṟṟukkuṭuttom mātavan tiruvaraṅka tevanāna kaṅkai koṇṭa coḻavi Āḻvārkku ka kku Āḻvārkoyil kaṇakku tiruvaraṅkamuṭaiyān Ārāvamutu villi na patineṭṭu nāṭṭu śrī vaiyiṣṇavapiriyananen Ivai Enneḻuttu tiruvara
ṅka piccar sa[ yiñai] yātanamaikku periya tirunantavānattu tiruvaraṅkamāḷi nampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Ivai tiruveṅkaṭatāca neḻuttu koyil kaṇakku māttūruṭaiyā neḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tirumaṇṭapa dāsaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku I Āḻvār tirumāñcolai nampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku I Āḻvār koyil kaṇakku Araiyan Ampalak kūtta nāna nānūṟṟuvap piriya nen Ivai E
nneḻuttu Ippaṭiyaṟiven Ārita(ta)n kecavan taniiḷañciṅkatten Ivai Enneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai rājarāja caruppetimaṅkalattu Arikulavāraṇadāsa neḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Āritan cirākavan cikāṟimāṟa ppaṭikku Ivai Āritaārāvamutu puṇṭarīka neḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai pāratāyan śrīrāman Ārāvamuti neḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai pāratāyan cera
van Aṟuperiyacaneḻuttu ItuThe inscription stops abruptly.
Digital edition of SII 24.92 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
